stories.title: Canada use stoppage-time winner to advance to roun...
World Cup VAR review: Why didn't Canada get a pena...
stories.summary: For the tournament, we are taking a look at the major incidents to examine and explain the process in terms of both VAR protocol and the laws of the game.

stories.title: Sources: Suns land Bridges in deal with Hornets
stories.summary: The Hornets are trading Miles Bridges, a 2029 first-round pick and a second-round pick to the Suns for Grayson Allen, Royce O'Neale and a 2033 first.

stories.title: Co-hosts Canada beat SA to book 1st last-16 spot
stories.summary: Stephen Eustáquio scored in the second minute of second-half stoppage time, and Canada beat South Africa 1-0 on Sunday for its first knockout match victory in a World Cup.

stories.title: Lynx's Reeve ties WNBA wins record with 379th
stories.summary: Cheryl Reeve tied Mike Thibault's WNBA record for career coaching wins at 379 as the Minnesota Lynx beat the Dallas Wings 85-77 on Sunday.
